entries.gt_02e9f132f108a6: Lift arachna cleared. It is quieter by the lift.
entries.gt_13c54aa5a979df: Betonoed opened a weak wall. Short passage open.
entries.gt_2b3155be20c59c: Quarantine breached: ${e.itemName ?? e.itemId ?? 'предмет'} carried out of ${containerName(e)}.
entries.gt_3a653377866540: Theft will go to audit: ${e.itemName ?? e.itemId ?? 'предмет'} from ${containerName(e)}.
entries.gt_3b5517ff114991: Coupon redeemed: ${e.itemName ?? e.itemId ?? 'пайковый документ'}. Ration issued.
entries.gt_4918fa38c0d361: Coupons stolen: ${e.itemName ?? e.itemId ?? 'пайковая бумага'}. Ration audit started.
entries.gt_5109a5b655c360: Lift arachna did not drop. Shaft is quiet.
entries.gt_5ffa08b763ddcd: Pseudolift settled into the shaft. Cabin passable again.
entries.gt_614324e19c31ca: Lift arachna dropped from the shaft.
entries.gt_6de1aeb776dfc9: Ration card sold on the market.
entries.gt_780de8762295f3: Pseudolift opened its cabin like a mouth.
entries.gt_813794175e8249: Betonoed driven away from the weak wall.
entries.gt_8c66ee7aef25d5: Someone else's quiet-block supply taken: ${e.itemName ?? e.itemId ?? 'предмет'}. Mark active.
entries.gt_8db20e79b6f2df: Workshop stopped: short on raw materials${e.roomId !== undefined ? ` в комнате #${e.roomId}` : ''}.
entries.gt_8ffd2ce5e2677d: Lift: lift arachna scraping above the shaft. Look up or back away.
entries.gt_b291bb1df18232: Ration document forged: ${e.itemName ?? e.itemId ?? 'карточка'}. Audit risk.
entries.gt_c213b13efbabb8: Ration audit closed. Ministry and queue checked the lists.
entries.gt_c814671b9a1daf: Supply returned to residents: ${e.itemName ?? e.itemId ?? 'предмет'} in ${containerName(e)}.
entries.gt_cc0f3c7a40b1f7: Lift arachna dropped to the noise and missed.
entries.gt_ceda53d0606969: Pseudolift went for the bait: ${e.itemName ?? e.itemId ?? 'предмет'}.
entries.gt_d0047eda2d2f66: Betonoed passage used as a shortcut.
entries.gt_d34efc93d693c0: Ration fraud reported: ${e.itemName ?? e.itemId ?? 'улика'}. Queue will recount rations.
entries.gt_043add7e4fba66: Owner will not sell after the room rumor.${memorySuffix}
entries.gt_04e375eb604107: Help is remembered here; prices are softer, caches are recalled more readily.
entries.gt_0697ad0b8a902e: The room remembers a loss; neighbors check your hands.
entries.gt_1698c837415a97: Theft: witnesses within ${THEFT_WITNESS_RADIUS} m or faction audit in ${Math.round(THEFT_AUDIT_COOLDOWN_S / 60)} min.${memorySuffix}
entries.gt_28f025c719357e: Money will leave a trade trail.
entries.gt_38fc77d5a78b11: dirty stash will spoil the supply
entries.gt_3f977ecefe8af4: food, water, or coupon into common supply
entries.gt_4c632c9644ab51: Fits: ${ITEMS[unlockItemId]?.name ?? unlockItemId}. Unlocking will be recorded.${memorySuffix}
entries.gt_4ffb122dd19ae4: Cloth will cover the white window and let the witness step away.
entries.gt_628b656bace164: Sealant will close the white crack under the frame.
entries.gt_7e45f1ada1976a: Owner: ${container.ownerName ?? 'неизвестен'}. Witnesses within ${THEFT_WITNESS_RADIUS} m or audit in ${Math.round(THEFT_AUDIT_COOLDOWN_S / 60)} min will start a rumor.${memorySuffix}
entries.gt_829bb47d95f486: cloth or sealant for the white crack
entries.gt_8565e667eda974: Owner: ${container.ownerName ?? 'неизвестен'}. Money will leave a trail instead of theft.${memorySuffix}
entries.gt_945c4840f013df: After fighting here, people answer through lists and witnesses.
entries.gt_9d7e8db36006fc: Purchase closed until talking to residents.${memorySuffix}
entries.gt_a216e0d991d92d: Need a key, code, or faction access.${memorySuffix}
entries.gt_bf289302a8d26a: Document will become an event and a rumor.
entries.gt_c4f4837a1ef493: After samosbor, people whisper here and count who was by the hermodoor.
entries.gt_cd0a8495164629: Contraband will go into the cache.
entries.gt_d2e2702ac279ec: Missing ${stolenCount} item type(s); owner may notice.
entries.gt_dfa56e288f983d: workshop output: receive, buy, or steal
entries.gt_f1ebcce22b2168: Can buy at scarcity price; no lockpick needed.${memorySuffix}
entries.gt_056c4938be798b: Seal broken. Inside is almost empty. Mark active.
entries.gt_165eae3ba29f30: ${def.name}: no direct use right now. Can be sold or thrown away.
entries.gt_375cb245284f56: Residents found extra lines in the fake list.
entries.gt_394ef4b8c9b205: White sand opened: the next ration or paper in the bag may spoil. Seal with sealant or keep a slot free.
entries.gt_46162d5e3e55b8: ${def?.name ?? item.defId} foamed in acid. Loot lost.
entries.gt_49dad1c3d69012: Stolen archive card turned in as evidence. Archive clearance issued.
entries.gt_620d888ea06fe9: Bait left: monsters may smell it.
entries.gt_65b2dfd5e21a3a: White sand spilled: ${spoiled.oldItemName} spoiled. Seal the sample with sealant.
entries.gt_752e23b9acfd35: Hermopack needs a free slot or room in the sample stack.
entries.gt_764a998696e587: Forged stub ready: form, ink, fake stamp. Take it to N3.
entries.gt_78cf334600cacf: Opened sample destroyed: water -4, HP -2. Cheaper than explaining the smell.
entries.gt_79cb1c8f28095a: Office mark rustles in the paper: ${noisyDocument.itemName}. Try again in a second.
entries.gt_846a462280a3ba: White sand shaken into the floor crack. Evidence destroyed.
entries.gt_92fa472f94d1db: Green acid hisses on ${def?.name ?? item.defId}. Need a filter layer; trying again will spoil the loot.
entries.gt_98c4d4d402ad56: Filter layer neutralized the acid: ${def?.name ?? item.defId} saved.
entries.gt_98c670156edada: ${ITEMS[defId]?.name ?? defId} sold on the market for ${price}₽. Access lost.
entries.gt_9a3a5e2a50f7bb: No room for issued access. Free a slot before the window.
entries.gt_a1668e9b55fa0e: ${ITEMS[defId]?.name ?? defId} accepted. Access issued. Inspection risk.
entries.gt_a82e282cabb917: No room for forged stub. Free a slot before stamping.
